nasb.text: then you shall investigate and search out and inquire thoroughly. If it is true and the matter established that this abomination has been done among you,

esv.text: then you shall inquire and make search and ask diligently. And behold, if it be true and certain that such an abomination has been done among you,

cnv.text: 你就要調查、研究，仔細訪問，如果的確有這可厭惡的事行在你們中間，

ccb.text: 你们要认真查明真相。如果传闻属实，你们当中确有此恶行，
